## butler-all-in-one docs

Generates documentation

### Synopsis

Generates command and flags documentation

```
butler-all-in-one docs [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --dir string      Directory where generate the documentation. (default "./")
      --format string   Supported formats: [md man rst yml]. (default "md")
  -h, --help            help for docs
```
